scope: Unblock pass: 1 of 5 legacy-parity read streams (global_metrics); map/listings_latest/categories/fiat remain blocked (ENGINE_GAP, see docs.md Known limits) after re-review against the new dialect (fan_out, keyed_object, start_page:0, extra_params, date-only bounds) -- none of those additions cover the pagination gap these 4 streams share. Full CoinMarketCap API surface (quotes/historical, OHLCV, exchange endpoints, DEX/on-chain) is out of scope until Pass B.
